title.en: Eating at a Fast Food Restaurant

phrases.en: At the counter, she ordered her food and a drink.
phrases.zh: 在柜台前，她点了食物和一杯饮料。

phrases.en: The clerk put the food on Jenny's tray, and Jenny paid her.
phrases.zh: 店员把食物放到珍妮的托盘上，珍妮付了钱。

phrases.en: Jenny took some paper napkins and a straw from the dispensers.
phrases.zh: 珍妮从分发器里取了几张纸巾和一根吸管。

phrases.en: She ate her lunch at her table.
phrases.zh: 她在自己的桌前吃午餐。

phrases.en: Other people got their food to go.
phrases.zh: 其他人则把食物打包带走。

phrases.en: When she finished eating, she threw the empty wrappers in the trash.
phrases.zh: 吃完后，她把空的包装纸扔进了垃圾桶。
